basics.name: Amaan Attar
basics.title: Automotive Engineer
basics.current_role: Master Thesis Student @ Harman International · ADAS & Autonomous Systems
basics.summary: Aspiring automotive engineer specialising in machine learning, sensor fusion, and deep learning for autonomous driving. Expert in ADAS testing, high-voltage battery systems, and AI-based optimisation — with hands-on experience across CANoe, PyTorch, MATLAB, and real-world V2X validation.

highlights: Supported system-level testing for ADAS features including L2+ functionalities using CANoe and CANape.
Created and managed test configurations for ECU communication (CAN, FlexRay); performed bug tracking via RQM.
Conducted log analysis, sensor validation, and HIL/SIL data preparation for automotive feature integration.
Developed tool automation scripts and internal apps for streamlined test result documentation.
Designed custom test rigs for battery nail penetration testing on BMW i4 G26 cells.
Developed MATLAB-based optimisation functions, improving data evaluation efficiency by 20%.
Conducted battery abuse testing for safety & durability, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards.
Automated data processing pipelines to support accurate calibration of battery pack functions.
Designed and validated high-voltage connectors using SolidWorks & CATIA.
Led design of a lightweight gearbox system: +15% torque transmission, −12% weight.
Conducted GD&T analysis and tolerance stack-ups for key drivetrain components.
Developed connector interfaces for powertrain systems ensuring mechanical & electrical compatibility.
Conducted quality assurance checks on 400+ high-voltage components on the production line, ensuring full alignment with Audi's quality standards.

projects.name: End-of-Line Testing System for Battery Modules
projects.description: Built a mechanical test rig for high-voltage battery packs with ISO compliance. Designed custom connectors, automated data acquisition, and conducted battery abuse testing for safety validation and repeatability.

projects.name: Powertrain Gearbox Design & Validation
projects.description: High-precision gearbox achieving +15% torque transmission and −12% weight. Led full validation, mechanical stress simulations, and applied GD&T for precise fitment in the Formula Student race car.

projects.name: Car2X Demonstration & Validation
projects.description: Real-world V2X communication validation at THI Testfield 'First Mile'. Built sensor fusion models (LiDAR, RADAR, GNSS, camera) for improved VRU detection and analysed RSU-based hazard detection latency.

projects.name: Automated Testing & Defect Analysis
projects.description: Python-based automated test scripts for Schanzer Racing, reducing manual errors. JIRA defect tracking, endurance testing, and standardised test case documentation for future development cycles.

publications.name: Workplace Safety using Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
publications.publisher: IJERT · International Journal of Engineering Research & Technology
